blocks.text: Match preview: Sussex face Hampshire in 39th Match (TEST) on Fri, 19 Jun, 2026, 3:30 pm at County Ground Hove. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard TEST surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 300–400 runs per innings typical.
Overcast · High 22°C / Low 18°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 17 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
